Query / Calculation Logic: Text presence check on column ms_1555_construction_complete_cpo_custom_field. No date comparison — just checks if the field is populated.
Status Determination Logic: On Track = field is non-empty; Delayed = field is empty/null. No delay days calculated.

Query / Calculation Logic: Date column pj_a_3850_bom_submitted_bom_in_bat_finish. Expected date = CX_Start - 42 days. CX_Start = Max(pj_p_3710_ran_entitlement_complete_finish, pj_p_4075_construction_ntp_submitted_to_gc_finish) + 50 days.
Status Determination Logic: On Track = actual_date <= expected_date; Delayed = actual_date > expected_date (delay = actual - expected days); In Progress = no actual date yet but expected_date >= today; Delayed = no actual date and expected_date < today.
